ac:rich-text-body.p: Jenkins shared library for embedded CI/CD pipelines. Supports Yocto, AOSP, and custom firmware builds with caching, Docker containers, artifact publishing, and multi-project integration.

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
flowchart TD subgraph Jenkins["Jenkins Controller"] JF["Jenkinsfile
pipeliner() / ciPipeline()"] subgraph SL["generic-cicd (shared library)"] CL["ConfigLoader
4-layer merge + validation"] PL["pipeliner.groovy"] SO["scmOps"] GO["gitOps"] DO["dockerOps"] AO["artifactoryOps
rtUpload / rtDownload"] PF["PlatformFactory
BitbucketAdapter
ArtifactoryAdapter"] end end subgraph Repos["Configuration Repos"] PC["project-config
──────────────
integration.yml
yocto-bsp.yml
aosp-platform.yml
custom-firmware.yml"] IM["integration-manifest
──────────────
default.xml
├ build.xml
├ projects.xml
├ yocto.xml
└ aosp.xml"] end subgraph Agent["Build Agent"] subgraph WS["Workspace (repo sync)"] BS["build-scripts/
├ yocto-build.sh
├ aosp-build.sh
└ custom-build.sh"] SRC["Sources
├ yocto/poky
├ yocto/meta-rpi
├ subsystems/*
└ aosp/"] CACHE["Cache
├ sstate
├ downloads
└ ccache"] end subgraph Docker["Docker Containers (parallel)"] YB["yocto-builder
bitbake"] AB["aosp-builder
lunch + m"] CB["cmake-cross
cmake"] end end ART["Artifactory
rtUpload
──────────────
*.wic.bz2 · *.img
firmware.bin"] JF --> PL PL --> CL CL --> PC PL --> SO SO --> IM IM -->|repo sync| WS BS --> YB BS --> AB BS --> CB YB --> AO AB --> AO CB --> AO AO --> ART style Jenkins fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0288d1 style SL fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#f57c00 style Repos fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#7b1fa2 style Agent fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#388e3c style Docker fill:#fce4ec,stroke:#c62828 style ART fill:#fff9c4,stroke:#f9a825

ac:rich-text-body.p: If the Mermaid macro is installed, the diagram above renders as an interactive flowchart. Otherwise, copy the Mermaid code into mermaid.live to view it.

tr.td: ConfigLoader, pipeliner, scmOps, gitOps, dockerOps, artifactoryOps, PlatformFactory
YAML configs per subsystem (integration.yml, yocto-bsp.yml, aosp-platform.yml, custom-firmware.yml)
Google repo manifest (default.xml with build.xml, projects.xml, yocto.xml, aosp.xml)
Sources synced via repo sync, build-scripts, cache (sstate, downloads, ccache)
yocto-builder (bitbake), aosp-builder (lunch+m), cmake-cross (cmake) — run in parallel

ol.li: ConfigLoader reads YAML from project-config (4-layer merge + validation)
repo sync fetches all sources from integration-manifest into workspace
Parallel builds — each subsystem runs its build-script inside a Docker container
Artifacts published to Artifactory via rtUpload

p: The library provides two entry points — both driven by YAML configuration:

ul.li: ciPipeline() — Single-project pipeline. Config lives in the project repo.
pipeliner() — Multi-project pipeline. Config lives in a separate config repo. Syncs sources from a manifest, then builds each subsystem in parallel.

p: All build logic lives in external shell scripts (see build-scripts repo), referenced via YAML config. No embedded bash in Groovy — the pipeline only handles orchestration, caching, and artifact management.

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body: ├── generic-cicd shared library ├── project-config pipeline YAML configs per subsystem ├── build-scripts build shell scripts (synced via manifest) └── integration-manifest repo manifest defining all sources

p: For single-project builds. The project repo has a Jenkinsfile and cicd.yml:

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body: my-project/ ├── Jenkinsfile @Library('generic-cicd') _ ; ciPipeline() ├── cicd.yml project type, stages, builder config ├── cicd-nightly.yml build type override (optional) └── platforms.yml git/artifact adapter config (optional)

project: name: my-firmware type: custom # yocto | aosp | custom buildType: ci # ci | nightly | release
environment: agent: "linux" timeout: 30 docker: image: my-builder:latest
custom: buildScript: build-scripts/build.sh
stages: [checkout, build, publish, notify]

p: For multi-project builds (e.g., Yocto + AOSP + custom firmware from a single manifest).

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body: project-config/ └── projects/ ├── integration.yml manifest, workspace, mirrors, subsystem list ├── custom-firmware.yml subsystem build config ├── yocto-bsp.yml subsystem build config └── aosp-platform.yml subsystem build config

mode: integration workspace: /mnt/workspace/myproject cleanWorkspace: true
manifest: url: <manifest-repo-url> branch: main reference: /mnt/workspace/mirrors/reference
stages: [checkout, build, notify] failFast: true
subsystems: - custom-firmware - yocto-bsp - aosp-platform

p: Component mode clones a single project. Use buildScripts to fetch build scripts separately (since there's no manifest sync):

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
mode: component
buildScripts: url: https://git.example.com/org/build-scripts.git branch: main
project: name: yocto-sdk-app repoUrl: https://git.example.com/org/yocto-sdk-app.git type: custom buildType: ci
custom: buildScript: build-scripts/component/cmake-build.sh

p: Relative paths are auto-resolved to absolute workspace paths.

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
project: name: yocto-bsp type: yocto buildType: ci
environment: agent: "build-yocto" timeout: 300 docker: image: yocto-builder:latest credentialId: artifactory-creds
yocto: buildScript: build-scripts/integration/yocto-build.sh
cache: - type: sstate src: cache/yocto/sstate - type: downloads src: cache/yocto/downloads
publish: artifacts: - pattern: "yocto/build/tmp/deploy/images/**/*.wic.bz2" repo: firmware-builds
stages: [checkout, build, publish, notify]

ol.li: Load Config — clones the config repo, reads projects/<config>.yml
Validate Config — checks mode, required fields, warns on issues
Clean Workspace — wipes workspace with Jenkins deleteDir() when cleanWorkspace: true
Disk Space Check — fails early if below environment.minDiskGB threshold
Sync Sources (integration) or Checkout (component) — repo sync or git clone
Parallel Builds — each subsystem builds on its own agent inside Docker container
Publish — push artifacts to Artifactory via rtUpload
Notify — sets build status on the Git platform
Cleanup — optionally removes intermediate build artifacts with deleteDir()

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body: cleanup: afterBuild: true keepArtifacts: true dirs: - path: yocto/build/tmp/work label: Yocto tmp/work - path: out label: AOSP out fullCleanOnly: true

p: All build logic lives in external scripts from the build-scripts repo. Scripts receive $WORKSPACE, $WORKSPACE_ROOT, and $CACHE_DIR as environment variables. Additional env vars can be set via the env key.

tr.td: Run the buildScript from YAML config
Push artifacts to Artifactory via rtUpload
Set build status on Git platform

p: Uses JFrog Artifactory plugin (rtUpload, rtDownload, rtSetProps, rtPromote) — no raw HTTP requests.

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
publish: artifacts: - pattern: "build/*.bin" repo: firmware-builds
artifacts: type: artifactory url: https://your-artifactory.jfrog.io credentialId: artifactory-creds defaultRepo: firmware-builds namingPattern: "${PROJECT}/${BUILD_TYPE}/${BUILD_NUMBER}"

p: Private registries are auto-detected from the image name and wrapped in docker.withRegistry().

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
git: type: bitbucket url: https://bitbucket.org workspace: <workspace-slug> credentialId: git-creds
artifacts: type: artifactory url: <artifactory-url> credentialId: artifactory-creds

tr.td: Set to true to validate without building
Wipe workspace with deleteDir() before build
Stop all subsystems on first failure
Local mirror path for repo init --reference
Subsystem names to build in parallel
Cache entries (sstate, downloads, ccache). Paths relative to workspace.

p: Pipeline, Git, Pipeline Utility Steps, Docker Pipeline, Repo, Credentials Binding, HTTP Request, JFrog Artifactory

ol.li: Add shared library in Manage Jenkins > System > Global Pipeline Libraries pointing to the generic-cicd repo
Create a Jenkinsfile with ciPipeline() or pipeliner()
Add YAML config to your project (or config repo for integration mode)

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body: generic-cicd/ ├── vars/ # Pipeline entry points & utility steps │ ├── pipeliner.groovy # unified pipeline engine │ ├── ciPipeline.groovy # single-project pipeline (wrapper) │ ├── scmOps.groovy # source control (repo manifest sync) │ ├── gitOps.groovy # git operations │ ├── dockerOps.groovy # docker build/push/tag │ └── artifactoryOps.groovy # rtDownload, rtSetProps, rtPromote ├── src/com/tcs/cicd/ │ ├── ConfigLoader.groovy # 4-layer config merge + validation │ ├── PlatformFactory.groovy # git/artifact adapter factory │ ├── Utils.groovy # shell escape, disk check, retry │ └── adapters/ │ ├── git/ # GitAdapter, BitbucketAdapter │ └── artifacts/ # ArtifactAdapter, ArtifactoryAdapter (rtUpload) ├── resources/config/ # Library defaults └── docker/ # Builder Dockerfiles

ul.li: project-config — YAML pipeline configs per subsystem
build-scripts — Build shell scripts (Yocto, AOSP, CMake)
